benefits.title: Why StayFinder?
benefits.subtitle: Everything you need for a seamless booking experience
benefits.secureBookingDesc: Your payments and personal information are protected with industry-leading encryption and security measures.
benefits.instantConfirmationDesc: No waiting around. Get immediate booking confirmation and start planning your trip right away.
benefits.support247Desc: Our dedicated support team is available around the clock to help with any questions or issues.
benefits.bestPriceDesc: Find a lower price elsewhere? We will match it and give you an additional discount on your booking.

apartmentDetails.noReviews: No reviews yet for this apartment.

bookingSidebar.dateConflict: Some of the selected dates conflict with existing bookings

cancellation.title: Cancellation Policy
cancellation.freeCancellationShort: Cancel up to 48 hours before check-in for a full refund.
cancellation.freeCancellationDesc: Cancel up to 48 hours before check-in for a full refund. No questions asked.
cancellation.partialRefundDesc: Cancel between 24-48 hours before check-in and receive a 50% refund of your total booking amount.
cancellation.nonRefundableDesc: Cancellations within 24 hours of check-in or no-shows are not eligible for any refund.
cancellation.note: All times are based on the property's local check-in time.

houseRules.title: House Rules
houseRules.smokingDesc: Smoking is not permitted inside the property.
houseRules.partiesDesc: Events and parties are not allowed on the premises.
houseRules.petsDesc: Well-behaved pets are welcome. Please inform the host in advance.
houseRules.quietHoursDesc: Please observe quiet hours between 10:00 PM and 8:00 AM.
houseRules.maxGuestsDesc: The number of guests should not exceed the maximum stated in the listing.

safety.title: Safety & Property Information
safety.emergencyContactsDesc: Local emergency: 911 | Host: Available 24/7 via app
